title: you’ve learned enough. now do this.
description:
✨ Join the Feel Good Manifestation Challenge in Resonance: https://resonance.lavendaire.com/manifestation-challenge?utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=feelgood

It starts with having a system designed to keep you returning. Transformation happens in those recurring small actions that lead to major shifts. That’s what we built @resonance.app for 🌔

Resonance embodies everything that I’ve spent the last 12 yrs teaching through Lavendaire. Designing your life encompasses designing your thoughts, your energy, your emotional state, your habits, your daily choices and actions.

You transform your life from the inner and outer realms. You can start at either end but you must have both, working together in alignment.

You don’t need more knowledge, more information, more searching, more scrolling. 

You need to get clear, get intentional, and take those actions every day that will take you toward that life you desire.

title: Feel Good Manifestation Affirmations ✨ Raise Your Vibration & Manifest Your Best Life
description:
✨ Join the Feel Good Manifestation Challenge in Resonance: https://resonance.lavendaire.com/manifestation-challenge?utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=feelgood

You have the power to shift your energy and manifest your dream life by choosing better-feeling thoughts. These manifestation affirmations are designed to help you raise your vibration, reprogram your mindset, and align with your most magnetic self.

Listen daily for 14 days to practice feeling good about yourself and your life—cultivating joy, gratitude, self love, abundance, confidence, and trust. The more you embody this energy, the more you become a match for the beautiful life you desire.

title: The Secret to Manifesting Most People Miss 💫
description:
✨ Join the Feel Good Manifestation Challenge: https://resonance.lavendaire.com/manifestation-challenge?utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=feelgood

How do you actually manifest? If you’ve been visualizing, scripting, or trying to think positively but still feel stuck, you may be missing one of the most important truths about manifestation: your body has to learn the feeling first.

Most manifestation advice focuses on strategies and techniques. Underneath it all is something simpler—learning how to feel good, practice better-feeling thoughts, notice resistance, and align with the emotional state of the life you want to create.

Manifestation begins with emotional alignment. In this video, we’ll explore how your body responds to your thoughts, why resistance can reveal where your inner work lives, and how practicing better-feeling thoughts can create real transformation.

Introducing the 14-Day Feel Good Manifestation Challenge ✨
✧ Feel Good Manifestation Affirmations
✧ Guided journal prompts
✧ Daily reminders, streaks & rewards
✧ Full Premium access during your free trial

If you're already a Resonance member, your challenge is waiting for you inside the app ✨

title: this is how you stay in your power ✨
description: Your energy is the foundation of your empowerment—and the world needs you in your power. When you feel good, you have the capacity to take action, show up fully, and do the things that actually matter. Taking care of yourself is never selfish. It's how change begins.

title: you can design how you feel 🌙
description: Your energy is always within reach—and it's something you can shape intentionally. A playlist that shifts your mood, a step outside, a quiet question you ask yourself before the day begins. These small acts of care are more powerful than they seem. They are what keep you grounded, even when everything around you feels heavy.

description:
